message.content:
CORRECTION: The frontend API client (already written) uses:
- `POST /api/v1/settings` (not PUT)  
- `GET /api/v1/settings/models` (not `/api/v1/models`)

Make sure your settings router uses those exact paths. The router prefix should be `/settings` (giving `/api/v1/settings`) and the models sub-path should be `/models` (giving `/api/v1/settings/models`). Use `POST` for saving settings. Everything else is the same as before.

content.text: Let me look at the current state of the codebase to understand what exists before making changes.

input.description: Find Python files related to settings/router/api

backend
docs
frontend
frontend-v2

1	from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
2	from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
3	from typing import Any
4	
5	from app.deps import get_db, get_current_user
6	from app.models.user import User
7	
8	router = APIRouter(tags=["settings"])
9	
10	FREE_MODELS = [
11	    {"id": "google/gemma-4-31b-it:free", "name": "Google Gemma 4 31B", "context_length": 262144, "provider": "openrouter", "free": True},
12	    {"id": "qwen/qwen3-next-80b-a3b-instruct:free", "name": "Qwen3 Next 80B", "context_length": 262144, "provider": "openrouter", "free": True},
13	    {"id": "nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free", "name": "NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super", "context_length": 262144, "provider": "openrouter", "free": True},
14	    {"id": "minimax/minimax-m2.5:free", "name": "MiniMax M2.5", "context_length": 196608, "provider": "openrouter", "free": True},
15	    {"id": "gpt-4o", "name": "GPT-4o", "context_length": 128000, "provider": "openai", "free": False},
16	    {"id": "gpt-4o-mini", "name": "GPT-4o Mini", "context_length": 128000, "provider": "openai", "free": False},
17	    {"id": "claude-sonnet-4-5", "name": "Claude Sonnet 4.5", "context_length": 200000, "provider": "anthropic", "free": False},
18	    {"id": "gemini-2.0-flash", "name": "Gemini 2.0 Flash", "context_length": 1048576, "provider": "gemini", "free": False},
19	]
20	
21	
22	def _mask_key(key: str) -> str:
23	    """Return last 4 chars of a key for hinting."""
24	    return key[-4:] if key and len(key) >= 4 else ""
25	
26	
27	@router.get("/settings")
28	async def get_settings(
29	    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
30	) -> dict[str, Any]:
31	    s = user.settings or {}
32	    openrouter_key = s.get("openrouter_key", "")
33	    openai_key = s.get("openai_key", "")
34	    anthropic_key = s.get("anthropic_key", "")
35	    gemini_key = s.get("gemini_key", "")
36	
37	    return {
38	        "provider": s.get("provider", "openrouter"),
39	        "model": s.get("model", "google/gemma-4-31b-it:free"),
40	        "has_openrouter_key": bool(openrouter_key),
41	        "openrouter_key_hint": f"...{_mask_key(openrouter_key)}" if openrouter_key else "",
42	        "has_openai_key": bool(openai_key),
43	        "has_anthropic_key": bool(anthropic_key),
44	        "has_gemini_key": bool(gemini_key),
45	    }
46	
47	
48	@router.put("/settings")
49	async def update_settings(
50	    body: dict,
51	    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
52	    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
53	) -> dict[str, bool]:
54	    s = dict(user.settings or {})
55	
56	    if "provider" in body and body["provider"]:
57	        s["provider"] = body["provider"]
58	    if "model" in body and body["model"]:
59	        s["model"] = body["model"]
60	
61	    # Only update keys if provided and non-empty
62	    for key_field in ("openrouter_key", "openai_key", "anthropic_key", "gemini_key"):
63	        if key_field in body and body[key_field]:
64	            s[key_field] = body[key_field]
65	
66	    user.settings = s
67	    db.add(user)
68	    await db.commit()
69	
70	    return {"success": True}
71	
72	
73	@router.get("/models")
74	async def list_models(
75	    user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
76	) -> dict[str, list]:
77	    return {"models": FREE_MODELS}
78
